tasks.subject: Task 1: Add notification event variants to the event bus
tasks.description:
**Goal:** lib/events.ts carries notification events and exports a ClientNotification type, with no change to publish/subscribe API.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/events.ts`
- Test: `tests/unit/events.notifications.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] publish('user-x', {type:'notification.created', notification}) received by subscribe('user-x', fn)
- [ ] notification.read (id) and notification.read.all variants type-check
- [ ] Existing per-document events still pass

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/events.notifications.test.ts` → PASS; tsc clean.

**Steps:** TDD — RED (ClientNotification not exported); add exported ClientNotification interface + three union variants to DocEvent; ensure DocEvent exported; GREEN.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/events.ts", "tests/unit/events.notifications.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/events.notifications.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["notification.created delivered per-user", "read + read.all variants typed", "existing events unaffected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Publish notification events from lib/notifications.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Creating notifications and marking them read publishes the corresponding per-user events.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/notifications.ts` (notifyParticipants, markRead, markAllRead)
- Test: `tests/unit/notifications.publish.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] notifyParticipants publishes one notification.created per recipient to user-<id> with client shape
- [ ] markRead publishes notification.read (id); markAllRead publishes notification.read.all
- [ ] Existing notification tests stay green (rows + email enqueue unchanged)

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/notifications.publish.test.ts tests/unit/notifications*.test.ts` → PASS.

**Steps:** TDD — subscribe spy to recipient topic; switch createMany→per-recipient create to capture id/createdAt; build ClientNotification payload (select document title); publish; add read/read.all publishes; preserve EMAILABLE branch.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/notifications.ts", "tests/unit/notifications.publish.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/notifications.publish.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["created published per recipient", "read/read.all published", "no regression in existing notif tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Per-user SSE route /api/notifications/stream
tasks.description:
**Goal:** An authenticated user gets an SSE stream of their notification events.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/api/notifications/stream/route.ts`
- Test: `tests/unit/notifications.stream.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Unauthenticated → 401
- [ ] Authenticated → text/event-stream, emits ': connected', forwards events published to user-<id>

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/notifications.stream.test.ts` → PASS.

**Steps:** copy app/api/documents/[id]/stream/route.ts; drop id param; subscribe to `user-${user.id}`; same SSE headers + heartbeat + cancel; RED→GREEN.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/notifications/stream/route.ts", "lib/events.ts", "tests/unit/notifications.stream.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/notifications.stream.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["401 unauth", "text/event-stream + connected", "forwards user-scoped events"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: User.desktopNotifications preference + migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A per-user opt-in flag for OS notifications, defaulting off.

**Files:**
- Modify: `prisma/schema.prisma` (User)
- Create: migration via `prisma migrate dev`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] User.desktopNotifications Boolean @default(false) exists; migration applies; generated types include it

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --name desktop_notifications` applies; tsc clean.

**Steps:** add field next to emailNotifications; run prisma migrate dev --name desktop_notifications; verify tsc; commit schema + migration.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "prisma/migrations/"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --name desktop_notifications && CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["field added default false", "migration applies", "types include field"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Desktop-notifications settings toggle + API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A settings toggle that requests browser permission and persists desktopNotifications.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/api/settings/notifications/route.ts`
- Modify: `components/NotificationSettings.tsx`
- Modify: `app/app/settings/notifications/page.tsx`
- Test: `tests/unit/settings.notifications.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] PATCH accepts emailNotifications or desktopNotifications (boolean), updates only provided, 400 if neither
- [ ] Toggling desktop ON calls Notification.requestPermission(); if not granted, reverts + no persist
- [ ] Page passes both current prefs to component

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/settings.notifications.test.ts` → PASS; tsc + lint clean.

**Steps:** TDD API (desktop update + 400); route accepts both fields; component → object initial + second toggle (data-testid=desktop-pref) with requestPermission flow; page selects+passes both; preserve email-pref.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/settings/notifications/route.ts", "components/NotificationSettings.tsx", "app/app/settings/notifications/page.tsx", "tests/unit/settings.notifications.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/settings.notifications.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PATCH both fields + 400", "permission gate on enable", "page passes both prefs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Pure unread reducer + OS-notify predicate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Testable pure functions for unread-count transitions and the OS-notify decision, decoupled from React/DOM.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/notification-client.ts`
- Test: `tests/unit/notification-client.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] nextUnread: +1 created, max(0,-1) read, 0 read.all, unchanged otherwise
- [ ] shouldFireOsNotification: true only when desktopEnabled && permission==='granted' && visibility==='hidden' && !seen.has(id)

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/notification-client.test.ts` → PASS.

**Steps:** TDD — RED (module missing); implement nextUnread switch + shouldFireOsNotification predicate over DocEvent type; GREEN.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/notification-client.ts", "tests/unit/notification-client.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/notification-client.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unread transitions correct", "predicate true only when all conditions hold"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: NotificationProvider — SSE, tab title, OS-notify; AppNav + InboxList
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A client provider mounted app-wide drives a live unread count (badge + tab title), fires OS notifications when appropriate, and feeds the inbox list live.

**Files:**
- Create: `components/NotificationProvider.tsx`
- Modify: `app/app/layout.tsx` (mount + seed initialUnread + desktopEnabled)
- Modify: `components/AppNav.tsx` (read unread from context)
- Modify: `components/InboxList.tsx` (consume items/actions from context)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] EventSource('/api/notifications/stream') with DocumentView reconnect pattern (close+2s retry; cleanup)
- [ ] unread seeds initialUnread, updates via nextUnread; document.title = '(N) Quorum AI' / 'Quorum AI'
- [ ] On notification.created fires new Notification iff shouldFireOsNotification; ids deduped in a ref
- [ ] AppNav badge + InboxList live; existing testids/aria-labels preserved

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && CI=true pnpm exec next lint && CI=true pnpm exec vitest run` clean/green; manual two-tab check.

**Steps:** build provider+context (useNotifications), reuse EventSource pattern, title effect, OS-notify via predicate, markRead/markAllRead via PATCH /api/notifications (match existing body shape); mount in layout selecting desktop pref; AppNav reads context; InboxList sources items/actions from context; optional light e2e (two-context badge increment).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/NotificationProvider.tsx", "app/app/layout.tsx", "components/AppNav.tsx", "components/InboxList.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && CI=true pnpm exec next lint && CI=true pnpm exec vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SSE reconnect pattern", "tab title reflects unread", "OS-notify gated by predicate + dedup", "AppNav + InboxList live, testids preserved"]}
```
